name: public_safety_school_district_s_new_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: A protest perimeter is tightening; legal advisers disagree on whether a new cordon meets constitutional muster under current case law. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety school district new millhaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Ravi Haddad
agents.identity: I am Ravi Haddad, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Marco Ishikawa, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Ravi Haddad must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Ravi Haddad do?
